<!-- Thanks for contributing to the LKE Landing Zone. Keep PRs focused. -->

## What

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `cd tools && go build ./... && go test ./... && go vet ./... && gofmt -l .` (if Go changed)
- [ ] `terraform fmt` / `tflint` clean (if Terraform changed)
- [ ] Chart `version:` bumped (if a chart changed)
- [ ] Docs updated; intra-repo links verified
- [ ] No secrets, internal-only identifiers, or `Co-Authored-By` trailers

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: migration steps, follow-ups, risk. -->
